chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ لِلْكَفَنِ وَ مَا يُكْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – What is recommended from the clothes for the shroud and what is disliked

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/318)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/318)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَيْسَ مِنْ لِبَاسِكُمْ شَيْ‏ءٌ أَحْسَنَ مِنَ الْبَيَاضِ فَأَلْبِسُوهُ مَوْتَاكُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abu Jameela, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is nothing better from your apparels than the white, therefore clothe your dead ones (in white)’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from abu Jamilah from Jabir who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘In your dresses the best is white. Dress up with them your deceased ones also.’”
